## Summary

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Set up environment: `SCAN_DIR=... ./ScopeGuardian --projectName ... --branch ... config.toml`
2. Observe the issue

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include any error messages or stack traces.

## Environment

| Field | Value |
| ----- | ----- |
| ScopeGuardian version / commit | |
| OS | |
| Go version (if built from source) | |
| Docker image tag (if using Docker) | |

Paste your `config.toml` here (remove any sensitive values):

```toml

```

## Logs

Paste relevant log output here (run without `-q` to capture full logs):

```
```

## Additional Context

Any other context, screenshots, or links that might help diagnose the issue.
